task_completion.description: Verify that Julian Rossi's basic information and T4 income are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax interface showing taxpayer name 'Julian Rossi', province of residence 'ON' (Ontario), and a T4 slip with $92,400 entered in Box 14 (Employment Income).

task_completion.description: Verify the entry of T4A jury duty pay and the corresponding remittance deduction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax showing a T4A slip with $1,450 entered for jury duty pay (Box 118) AND a corresponding deduction of $1,450 entered on line 23200 (Other deductions) for remitting the pay to the employer.

task_completion.description: Verify the deduction of professional dues and legal fees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax showing $485 entered for annual union, professional, or like dues (Line 21200) and $2,800 entered for legal fees (Line 22900).

task_completion.description: Verify the entry of federal and provincial political contributions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax showing $850 entered for federal political contributions and $600 entered for provincial (Ontario) political contributions.

task_completion.description: Verify the entry of the digital news subscription tax credit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax showing $299 entered for the digital news subscription tax credit (Line 31350). Note: The value must be truncated to 299, not 299.99.

task_completion.description: Verify the tax return is saved to the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax window title, save dialog, or file explorer showing the file saved as 'julian_rossi.24t' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the StudioTax 2024 GUI to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the StudioTax 2024 application interface being actively used, rather than a script or text editor modifying the .24t file directly.

integrity.description: The agent navigated through the appropriate tax forms and schedules.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing individual slips (T4, T4A) and specific deduction forms/lines being filled out, rather than just typing final numbers into a summary page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use Python scripts or terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or code editors are visible executing scripts to generate the .24t file or inject the expected values.
